maintenance.title: We're under maintenance
maintenance.description: We're improving the platform to give you a faster and more stable experience. Thanks for your patience.

tagline.line1: The ultimate control center for your YouTube channel.

analytics.title: Advanced analytics
analytics.description: View the performance of every video with real-time data and key trends.

audience.title: Audience
audience.description: Learn about your audience, where they come from, what they like, and when they're active.

growth.title: Growth
growth.description: Track subscriber and view growth with smart projections.

management.title: Video management
management.description: Manage all your videos, thumbnails, and metadata from one place.

live.title: Live monitoring
live.description: Watch how your videos perform during the critical first hours after publishing.

actions.title: Quick actions
actions.description: Automate repetitive tasks and optimize your creator workflow.

cta.helper: Securely connect your account with OAuth 2.0

header.title: YouTube statistics
header.subtitle: Quick snapshot of views, followers, and monetization.

header.title: Test thumbnails
header.subtitle: Upload a thumbnail and see how it looks on different devices.

upload.title: Upload thumbnail
upload.description: Select an image to preview it on devices.

metadata.title: Video details
metadata.description: Customize the sample data shown with your thumbnail.

preview.title: Preview
preview.subtitle: See how your thumbnail looks on each device.
